name: Agmatine sulfate
summary: Decision-ready summary: Agmatine sulfate is best framed for neuropathic pain research context; nitric oxide modulation; mood support context; safety screen: blood pressure medications; psychiatric medications; limited safety data.
description: Agmatine sulfate supports pain; mood; nitric oxide with low confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: Caution with antihypertensive medication due to a theoretical blood-pressure-lowering effect via nitric-oxide and imidazoline-receptor pathways
human safety data are limited to short trials of a few weeks or less such as the Keynan et al. 2010 RCT which reported no treatment-related adverse events at roughly 1335 to 3560 mg per day.
